text.title: API Gateway Patterns & Technology Selection Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the api-gateway-patterns methodology end-to-end.

step.name: audit-clients
step.action: List every (client, service) edge and flag cross-cutting concerns each edge needs.
step.decision-gate: If matrix shows ≤2 edges with 0 cross-cutting concerns, recommend skip.

step.name: pick-pattern
step.action: Choose pattern: edge (one client family), bff (multiple client families with divergent needs), per-service (high-isolation requirement), none.

step.name: score-products
step.action: Score candidate products on: managed-UX, plugin ecosystem, footprint, license, team familiarity.
step.decision-gate: If only 1 candidate scored, expand the candidate set — single-option scoring is rationalization.

step.name: draft-adr
step.action: Fill templates/gateway-selection-adr.md; record alternatives + rollback path.

step.name: wire-ci-gate
step.action: Add a CI step that fails if any service exposes routes outside the chosen gateway pattern (route registry diff).
step.decision-gate: If team has no service catalog, ship a stub before merging the gate.
